GitHub Actions workflows for issue locking, publishing, and testing.


## Files
- **[lock.yaml](lock.yaml.md)**: Automates locking of inactive closed issues and pull requests after two weeks of inactivity.
- **[publish.yaml](publish.yaml.md)**: GitHub Actions workflow for building, generating provenance, creating releases, and publishing to PyPI.
- **[tests.yaml](tests.yaml.md)**: GitHub Actions workflow for running tests on multiple OS and Python versions in the Flask codebase.
